subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up on our conversation from the conference. I'd be glad to arrange a formal meeting to explore how Vendor Inc. and our team might work together.

Here are some available slots next week:

• Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let me know which time works best for you.

Regarding your request for direct contact details of our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not able to share internal contact information. However, if our initial discussion goes well and there's clear alignment, I can certainly explore options for a senior-level technical call through the appropriate channels.

Thanks again for reaching out, and I look forward to your reply.

Best regards
